messages.content: Reply with exactly OK and nothing else.

tools.name: Bash
tools.description: Execute a shell command. Provide a single string "command" that the system will run in a subprocess. Use for file operations, process inspection, running tests, etc.

tools.name: Read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file. The file_path must be absolute. Returns up to 2000 lines starting from the optional offset.

tools.name: Write
tools.description: Write content to a file, overwriting if it exists. The file_path must be absolute. Creates parent directories as needed.
